---
title: "Legacy Paper Reproduction"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Legacy Paper Reproduction}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  \usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
---

The EP-learner paper experiments are preserved in this repository, but they
are intentionally separated from the production package build.

Use the frozen legacy ref when you want to reproduce the paper pipeline:

```r
source("paper_EPlearner_experiments/install_legacy_paper_repro.R")
```

That script installs:

- `Larsvanderlaan/hte3@legacy-paper-repro`

The production branch can then evolve independently without invalidating the
paper workflow.

For automated verification, see `inst/legacy/run_smoke.R` and the
`legacy-paper-smoke` GitHub Actions workflow.
